claim_boundary: Closure audit only. This is not a new benchmark campaign, not a Slurm/GPU submission, and not a paper-facing claim.
issue_title: fix: camera-ready campaign path drops trace-capture flags (run_batch TypeError) - blocks #4206 trace-capable re-run

linked_prs.title: Fix trace-capture flag plumbing in camera-ready path (#4425)
linked_prs.role: plumbed trace-capture flags through the camera-ready batch path and added regression/smoke evidence

issue_comments_reviewed.author: ll7
issue_comments_reviewed.summary: PR #4428 merged; trace-capture flag plumbed end-to-end through camera-ready batch path, default-off, with resume-identity fix and regression test. Comment states this closes the flag-plumbing slice for #4425.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Plumb record_planner_decision_trace and record_simulation_step_trace from the campaign config through camera-ready batch invocation into the episode runner, default off when absent.
evidence: PR #4428 changed robot_sf/benchmark/runner.py, robot_sf/benchmark/map_runner.py, robot_sf/benchmark/map_runner_batch_plan.py, robot_sf/benchmark/map_runner_worker.py, and robot_sf/benchmark/map_runner_identity.py.
The PR body records record_planner_decision_trace as a new default-off run_batch/run_map_batch API parameter and notes that existing record_simulation_step_trace plumbing was preserved.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Regression test proves a campaign-path config carrying trace flags reaches the episode-layer boundary without executing a full episode in continuous integration.
evidence: PR #4428 validation recorded targeted pytest passing for tests/benchmark/test_map_runner_utils.py::test_map_batch_plan_builds_worker_fixed_params and tests/benchmark/test_camera_ready_campaign.py::test_run_campaign_writes_core_artifacts.
The merged PR also added resume-identity regression coverage so trace-enabled rows do not reuse non-trace rows.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: One-arm, one-seed CPU smoke invocation of the trace-capable config writes at least one episode row carrying native failure_mechanism and interaction_exposure blocks, with row keys pasted in the PR.
evidence: PR #4428 validation recorded a CPU smoke command exiting 0 with status=benchmark_success and row_count=1.
The smoke row top-level keys include failure_mechanism and interaction_exposure.
The sanitized row-key evidence in this artifact records the native failure_mechanism and interaction_exposure key sets without worktree-local output paths.

residual_risks.risk: Issue #4425 may remain open until a maintainer-authorized closer posts the criterion-to-evidence closure comment and closes it.
residual_risks.why_it_remains: This run was authorized for triage, local edits, validation, branch push, and PR opening, but not for issue or PR comments.

residual_risks.risk: No full #4206 trace-capable campaign rerun was performed.
residual_risks.why_it_remains: The issue acceptance criterion only required a one-arm, one-seed CPU smoke proof; full benchmark campaigns and Slurm/GPU submissions are out of scope for this closure audit.
